name: Soviet Soldier
short_description: Experience history from the perspective of the Red Army in this story-driven FPS game. Make choices that will affect your comrades and the entire world. Fight in historical battles where you put down insurgents, eliminate enemies, and defend the motherland. The fate of the USSR rests in your hands.
detailed_description:
Experience various historical settings and battles that took place during the Great Patriotic War and Cold War. Fight in Stalingrad and Berlin to avenge the fate of your fellow comrades. Counter the West’s influence in Hungary and Afghanistan in the Cold War.

Historical Settings

Soviet Soldier offers an immersive journey through the tumultuous history of the Soviet Union, unfolding across four gripping campaigns and 14 hand-crafted levels. At every juncture, you hold the power to shape history's course. Will you exact vengeance on German prisoners for their deeds against your comrades? Will you quell the Hungarian uprising or seek a path to peace? In Afghanistan, will you blindly follow KGB directives or forge your own path? And when faced with the pivotal 1991 coup, will you strive to preserve the old Soviet Union or embrace Boris Yeltsin's vision of change? Your choices will reverberate through the annals of history, making each level a dynamic and unforgettable experience.

FPS

Soviet Soldier boasts an array of historically accurate weapons spanning different eras of the Soviet Union, from classic World War II firearms like the Mosin-Nagant to Cold War icons like the AK-47.

Characters

Soviet Soldier features a wide array of characters with varying experiences and perspectives on the Soviet Union. Throughout the game, you'll have the chance to support, deceive, or betray them.

Multiple Endings

There are six different endings that are determined by the choices you make. Some choices are obvious in how they will impact the ending, while others are less clear. So be careful in every decision you make.

supported_languages:
English*, Spanish - Spain, Russian
*languages with full audio support
